'''竏嗟-dh-b''' ('''kaladhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longlist|longlist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longlist|longlist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kaladhab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladhab|thiladhab]] || [[word:jiladhab|jiladhab]] || [[word:shiladhab|shiladhab]] || [[word:kiladhab|kiladhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladhab|thuthuladhab]] || [[word:jujuladhab|jujuladhab]] || [[word:shushuladhab|shushuladhab]] || [[word:kukuladhab|kukuladhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuladhab|thuladhab]] || [[word:juladhab|juladhab]] || [[word:shuladhab|shuladhab]] || [[word:kuladhab|kuladhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuladhab|thuladhab]] || [[word:juladhab|juladhab]] || [[word:shuladhab|shuladhab]] || [[word:kuladhab|kuladhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theladhab|theladhab]] || [[word:jeladhab|jeladhab]] || [[word:sheladhab|sheladhab]] || [[word:keladhab|keladhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholadhab|thotholadhab]] || [[word:jojoladhab|jojoladhab]] || [[word:shosholadhab|shosholadhab]] || [[word:kokoladhab|kokoladhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholadhab|tholadhab]] || [[word:joladhab|joladhab]] || [[word:sholadhab|sholadhab]] || [[word:koladhab|koladhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadhab|tholadhab]] || [[word:joladhab|joladhab]] || [[word:sholadhab|sholadhab]] || [[word:koladhab|koladhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]] || [[word:ladhab|ladhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦladhab|thﾃｦladhab]] || [[word:jﾃｦladhab|jﾃｦladhab]] || [[word:shﾃｦladhab|shﾃｦladhab]] || [[word:kﾃｦladhab|kﾃｦladhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaladhab|thathaladhab]] || [[word:jajaladhab|jajaladhab]] || [[word:shashaladhab|shashaladhab]] || [[word:kakaladhab|kakaladhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaladhab|thaladhab]] || [[word:jaladhab|jaladhab]] || [[word:shaladhab|shaladhab]] || [[word:kaladhab|kaladhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaladhab|thaladhab]] || [[word:jaladhab|jaladhab]] || [[word:shaladhab|shaladhab]] || [[word:kaladhab|kaladhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaladhab|shaladhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaladhab|goshaladhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaladhab|gokishaladhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaladhabnﾃｼ|shaladhabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhabnknﾃｼ|goshaladhabnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhabnﾃｼ|gokishaladhabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaladhabshﾃｫ|shaladhabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkshﾃｫ|goshaladhabnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaladhabshﾃｫ|gokishaladhabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhabro|shaladhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkro|goshaladhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhabro|gokishaladhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhabmu|shaladhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkmu|goshaladhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhabmu|gokishaladhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaladhabsher|shaladhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaladhabnksher|goshaladhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaladhabsher|gokishaladhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaladhabng|shaladhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkng|goshaladhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaladhabng|gokishaladhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaladhabya|shaladhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkya|goshaladhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaladhabya|gokishaladhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaladhabyam|shaladhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkyam|goshaladhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaladhabyam|gokishaladhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shaladhabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshaladhabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishaladhabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhabnﾃｼro|shaladhabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhabnknﾃｼro|goshaladhabnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhabnﾃｼro|gokishaladhabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhabnﾃｼmu|shaladhabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhabnknﾃｼmu|goshaladhabnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhabnﾃｼmu|gokishaladhabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shaladhabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshaladhabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishaladhabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhabshﾃｫro|shaladhabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkshﾃｫro|goshaladhabnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhabshﾃｫro|gokishaladhabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhabshﾃｫmu|shaladhabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkshﾃｫmu|goshaladhabnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhabshﾃｫmu|gokishaladhabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhabronﾃｼ|shaladhabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkronﾃｼ|goshaladhabnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhabronﾃｼ|gokishaladhabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhabroshﾃｫ|shaladhabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkroshﾃｫ|goshaladhabnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhabroshﾃｫ|gokishaladhabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhabromu|shaladhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkromu|goshaladhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhabromu|gokishaladhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhabmunﾃｼ|shaladhabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkmunﾃｼ|goshaladhabnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhabmunﾃｼ|gokishaladhabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhabmushﾃｫ|shaladhabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkmushﾃｫ|goshaladhabnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhabmushﾃｫ|gokishaladhabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhabmuro|shaladhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhabnkmuro|goshaladhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhabmuro|gokishaladhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
